name: 247 CarFinance
key_intel: UK's largest online car finance broker by traffic (1.75M unique users). 275+ products compared. 4.9 Trustpilot — highest in market.

name: Zuto
key_intel: Exclusive AutoTrader + ClearScore partnerships. B Corp certified. 35% YoY revenue growth. Bridgepoint PE backing for expansion.

name: Oodle Car Finance
key_intel: Direct lender (not broker) — underwrites own risk. £393M ABS securitisation Nov 2025. £12.8M FCA redress provision. Never used DCAs.

name: Moneybarn
key_intel: Being deprioritised by Vanquis — £71M goodwill write-off. New contracts down 24% in 2024 (38,500 vs 50,800). FCA fined £2.77M + £30M+ redress. Capital redirecting to credit cards.

name: First Response Finance
key_intel: Most stable of subprime lenders. No FCA enforcement actions. Backed by ITOCHU (major Japanese trading house). Max loan £15K — smaller ticket focus.

name: Advantage Finance
key_intel: NO LONGER LENDING. Secure Trust Bank exited vehicle finance Jul 2025, sold book to LCM Partners Dec 2025 for £459M. Run-off only. DCA redress drove exit.

name: Close Brothers Motor Finance
key_intel: £1.9bn motor loan book (20% of £9.5bn group). 5,300+ dealer partners. £300M DCA provision (Viceroy estimates £572M-£1.23B). 600 job cuts announced. Temporarily paused UK motor lending.

name: Evolution Funding
key_intel: UK's largest used auto finance broker. 4,500+ dealer partners. 30+ lender panel. Best Broker at Car Finance Awards 10 consecutive years. Automated credit-score-based pricing.

name: Startline Motor Finance
key_intel: Pioneered 'near-prime' category in UK. £625M AUM. £475M JP Morgan credit facility (Jan 2025). £747M in securitisations. Targets 3% market share. Covers 50% of top 50 franchise dealers.

name: Lookers
owner: Alpha Auto Group (Toronto) — acquired Oct 2023 for £504M
key_intel: ~135 dealerships, 32+ brands, ~172K vehicles/year. Revenue £4.29bn (FY2024). Used finance penetration 50.6%. Captive + panel lender model. 55% profit boost in first year under Alpha Auto.
